steps.t: Gwendrian has asked you to look for her companion in Gwâl Cruban. Gwâl Cruban is in northern Swanfleet.
You found Innathron in Gwâl Cruban, however, he has managed to get his foot stuck in a small sink hole. You should try to free Innathron.
Innathron is waiting to thank you for freeing him. Innathron is in Gwâl Cruban, in northern Swanfleet.
